critic_notes: IND.2.4 Maschine: 3 questions on Fernwartung policy, lifecycle support, and lateral-movement prevention. Quotes exist in full source but outside the manifest range (same IND.* manifest drift). Content is valid for IND.2.4. Correct answers supported; distractors wrong. `experte` on 003 is borderline — close paraphrase of a MUSS NOT clause.
